articles.full_text:
Forecast of rain and thunderstorms in the North, ending intense heat
According to the meteorological agency, it is forecast that from the evening of May 16, there is a possibility of showers and scattered thunderstorms in the North; the heat wave in this area is likely to end from May 17.
